'''Quillan''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] on the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Council of Moffs]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He was one of the most vehement opponents of [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] suggestion for negotiated peace with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], going so far as to say that Pellaeon had no business running the military.

In [[44 ABY]], he was one of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s most ardent public supporters in the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s general election.

{{Char-stub}}
